message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam actor {
  BackgroundColor #EAEAEA
  BorderColor #000000
}
skinparam rectangle {
  BackgroundColor #EAEAEA
  BorderColor #000000
}

actor "Admin" as Admin
rectangle ":System" as System

Admin -> System : Requests the vehicle maximum payload
activate System
System --> Admin : Asks for the vehicle ID
deactivate System
Admin -> System : Fills the information
activate System
System --> Admin : Validates and presents the vehicle maximum payload.
deactivate System

@enduml
```
